untranslatable_reason: Signal requires detection of consolidation formation (pattern recognition beyond available indicators) and specific volume confirmation rules. Exact thresholds for stop loss distance, take profit multiple, confirmation bars, and volume multiplier are marked [THRESHOLD_NEEDED] in source and cannot be determined from provided text. Used Donchian breakout as proxy for consolidation range breakout, but consolidation detection itself is not expressible with available indicators.
translation_notes: Translated consolidation range breakout as Donchian Channel breakout (dc_upper/dc_lower), which is a common consolidation proxy. Entry on breakout bar is implicit in crosses_above/crosses_below operators. Stop loss set to conservative 2.0% as placeholder. Take profit ATR multiple set to 2.0x as reasonable default for risk/reward. Author did not specify explicit exit conditions beyond stop loss, so reversal of breakout condition used as exit trigger.
